title: Princess & Unicorn Party Bags, Pack of 8
features: Pack of 8 Princess and Unicorn Party Bags
Favour bags measure approximately 23cm x 18cm (9" x 7")
Great for handing out gifts at a princess birthday party or unicorn theme party
Ideal for filling with sweets, cookies or party favours
Combine with other Princess & Unicorn party supplies from Unique Party
description: From the manufacturer Princess Unicorn Add-On Items These add-on items are the perfect addition to your Princess Unicorn Birthday Party. Go bold with a contrasting solid colour theme to complement this range and make your party POP! Are you having helium balloons? Don't forget the curling ribbon and weights!
